nasb.text: Then they sat down on the ground with him for seven days and seven nights with no one speaking a word to him, for they saw that his pain was very great.

esv.text: And they sat with him on the ground seven days and seven nights, and no one spoke a word to him, for they saw that his suffering was very great.

cnv.text: 他們就七天七夜與他一起坐在地上，沒有人向他說一句話，因為他們看出他極其痛苦。

ccb.text: 他们看到约伯极其痛苦，就陪着他在地上坐了七天七夜，没有对他说一句话。
